prompt: Flop A-7-2 rainbow. Choose CALL for the calmer board or RAISE for the more pressure-building board.
intro_v1: Read the real board first. Dry flops usually keep pressure lower because fewer turn cards change the picture fast.
why_v1: A-7-2 rainbow is dry, so fewer draws and turn shifts build pressure right away.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This flop stays calmer because it does not create many immediate draw paths.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This flop is the calmer board because the texture stays dry and stable.
